title: Cook It!
description: A mod that adds a variety of treats to cook!
body:
# Cook It!
[![Featured in BlanketCon '25](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/worldwidepixel/badges/642d312b71811b9d2696b562f735b07288844c71/bc25/featured_in/cozy.svg)](https://modfest.net/bc25)


Cook It is a mod that brings many new foods to the game. It adds various appliances, foods, and equipment. 

There is an abundance of customization, from different wood types for cutting boards and rolling pins, to color variations of plates and bowls.

## 🚧 THIS MOD IS A WORK IN PROGRESS
I'm not the best developer so there might be some issues, please report them on GitHub or in the Discord!

## 🔨 Have any suggestions or feedback?
Join the discord and present your ideas!

##


Currently, many recipes require dough, which can be crafted with 3 wheat and a water bucket.

### Cutting Board
Main workstation for this mod. Here you can roll, cut, and shape your dough into different goods, like pizza, croissants, donuts, and cinnamon rolls.

### Oven
Here is where you can bake goods. Use equipment, such as muffin tins, pizza pans, and baking sheets to bake multiple items at once.

### Fryer
Get a fryer basket and use this to fry donuts and french fries. You can right click plates and cutting boards with a fryer basket to pick up / drop foods.
